blast_radius: critical: registry, receipt, handoff, tracker, bounded subprocess decisions, and future CDR artifacts depend on JSON write correctness
goals: Provide canonical shared atomic JSON writer under 0_kernel/lib/io/atomic_json_writer_v1.py
Accept a structured AtomicJsonWriteEnvelope.v1 and emit AtomicJsonWriteDecisionPacket.v1
Validate target path against explicit allowlisted roots before opening files
Reject path traversal, absolute-path escape, symlink target/ancestor, unsupported extension, non-JSON-serializable payload, and unsafe overwrite modes
Write temp file in destination directory, flush/fsync temp file, os.replace into final path, fsync parent directory where available
Write structured receipts and failure-learning candidates for denied/failed writes
Provide executable fixtures for positive and negative cases in Stage2
non_goals_stage1: No source implementation in this stage
No caller retrofit in this stage
No full OS export in this stage
problem_statement: MetaBlooms needs a single CDR-critical JSON write primitive for state, receipts, registries, handoffs, and failure-learning events. The primitive must prevent partial writes, path traversal, symlink writes, malformed JSON commits, and silent durability gaps.
